task_completion.description: Open the Avare app menu from the map screen
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot shows the Avare main navigation menu (which includes options like Preferences) opened over the map screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Avare Preferences screen
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot shows the main Preferences menu of the Avare app, listing preference categories such as Display, GPS, etc.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Display preferences category
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot shows the 'Display' preferences screen within the Avare app.
A screenshot shows the 'Night Mode (requires restart)' checkbox in the checked (true/enabled) state.

task_completion.description: Return to the main map screen
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show the Avare app successfully navigated back to the main aviation map screen.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to change the setting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard touch interactions with the Avare app UI, rather than terminal commands (e.g., adb shell) or text editors modifying XML files.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Avare application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screens shown belong to the Avare aviation GPS app (com.ds.avare), identifiable by its specific map interface and preference menus, not a generic settings app.

integrity.description: The agent changed the setting inside the app's internal preferences.
integrity.visual_evidence: The preferences menu shown is internal to the Avare app, not the global Android system Settings app.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target setting is specifically labeled 'Night Mode (requires restart)' and is located in the Display category of the Avare app's preferences. It is a CheckBoxPreference, meaning 'enabled' requires the checkbox to be visibly checked.
